docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2008 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAY-30-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE GIVEN TO PLAINTIFF IN OPEN COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COSTELLO, PERCEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUNIAN, SHAREEN $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,750.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2500.00, AND ATTRIBUTES 30% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COSTELLO, PERCEL AS TO DEFENDANT PUNIAN, SHAREEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COSTELLO, PERCEL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED APR-09-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PUNIAN, SHAREEN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
